title: Word Chef
description: Word Chef is a classic word search puzzle game. This free word game makes learning new words fun.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Animation & Coloring Alphabet Lore
description: Learn and draw the Alphabet with Animation & Coloring Alphabet Lore, a fun and educational simulation game. You will discover the secrets of each letter before you bring it to life with your own colors and creativity. You can choose from sixteen letters and Free Draw mode to unleash your imagination. You can also use different tools and colors to make your drawings more amazing. There is no time limit or score in this game, just relax and enjoy the art of drawing!

title: Tropical Match 2
description: Tropical Match is back with its highly anticipated second sequel! Join your island friend Coco for a colorful Match 3 adventure in a lush tropical paradise. Match juicy fruits, vibrant flowers, and clear away algae and clouds across 1,250+ exciting levels. Complete Daily Missions and discover tropical treasures along the way! With relaxing island tunes and gorgeous scenery, this is the perfect summer escape. Dive in and start your tropical adventure today!

title: Pinball Basketball
description: A captivating fusion of classic arcade pinball excitement and thrilling sports gameplay. Flip your paddle skillfully to keep the ball in play, aiming for the basketball hoop while enjoying the stunning minimalist art and responsive design that make every moment electrifying and addictive.

title: Catch a Fish Obby
description: Catch a Fish Obby is a chaotic collector raider set in a bright obby world full of Fish and Brainrot Fish characters. Build a money making base with your favorite sea creatures, sneak into rival bases to steal their fish, and protect your own tank from greedy bots and other players.

title: Labubu And Me
description: Play this fun game for girls where you style your own Labubu monster and yourself! Customize Labubu with fur colors, eyes, tops, stickers, and accessories. Then, match your makeup and outfits to create the ultimate twin look. From trendy dresses and cute bags to stylish hairstyles, show off your fashion skills and creativity. Perfect for fans of Labubu games and makeover fun!

title: Capybara Xmas Merge
description:
Capybara Xmas Merge is a cute and cozy holiday game where you combine adorable Christmas capybaras!
Drop festive capybaras into the box, watch them roll and bump into each other, and merge into bigger, funnier holiday characters.
Create giant capybaras, score points, and enjoy the warm winter atmosphere.

title: Draw Bridge Puzzle
description: Draw Bridge Puzzle is a creative and exciting puzzle game that combines drawing and rescue gameplay into one addictive experience. You become a bridge designer, using your finger to draw safe paths and complete thrilling rescue missions. Enter the car mode, draw a strong bridge to help a motor cross gaps, broken roads, and dangerous obstacles to reach the goal.

title: Save the crop
description: Save the Crop is an exciting arcade game where you control a tractor to rescue crops from fire! ?? Quickly cut and collect crops before they burn, then stack and sell them to earn money. Use your earnings to upgrade your tractor, buy storage houses, and explore new fields. Navigate using joystick controls and master the art of saving and farming in this fast-paced, action-packed game!

title: Skillful Finger
description: Touch the screen and slide your finger along the glowing line without lifting it. Avoid barriers, stay clear of the edges, and react quickly as the speed increases. Customize your ball and tail, face dynamic obstacles, and enjoy endlessly generated paths that keep every run fast, challenging, and addictive.

title: Soccer Arena X
description: Soccer Arena X is an exciting football game that delivers dynamic matches, simple controls, and colorful arcade gameplay. Every match is fast, fun, and full of energy, giving you the ultimate multiplayer football experience. As you progress, you’ll collect coins and gems to unlock powerful abilities like freeze, lightning, super kick, or a giant head, adding a bright and entertaining arcade style to the gameplay. Step onto the pitch, score goals, and become a football star!

title: Hide Me
description: Do you love the thrill of cat and mouse games? Are you ready to outsmart your pursuers and claim victory? Dive into "Hide Me", the latest hide-and-seek adventure that will put your wits and reflexes to the test!

title: Count Masters Superhero
description: In Count Masters: Superhero, begin an interesting parkour adventure like no other! As a superhero,you're constantly running, jumping, and avoiding obstacles throughout the level. Such as avoiding rotating mace, cutting machine and so on.

title: Eastern Star vs City Style Icon
description: Welcome to the world of style, where the ancient palaces of the East meet the splendor of a modern metropolis! Two beautiful heroines are waiting for you in the game: an oriental beauty with exquisite outfits in the style of an Ottoman fairy tale and a stylish urban fashionista conquering the catwalks of the metropolis. During the game, you will become a fashion stylist and create unique looks for each of the girls. Choose your side in the cultural dispute and make this choice a reality!

title: Coffee Craze - Sorting Game
description: Play Coffee Craze - Sorting Game free online and step into a lively café in a fast-loading browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Sort colorful cups, match drinks by type, and think ahead in a satisfying logic puzzle that doubles as a quick brain game. This unblocked game runs smoothly at school or home and is fully mobile-friendly. Optimized for desktop and mobile, it’s a free online game perfect for quick breaks and clever sorting fun anytime.

title: Capybara Block Drop
description:
Capybara Block Drop is a fast-paced, brain-teasing puzzle game where merging numbers and staying calm under pressure is the key to survival.

Drop numbered blocks into columns, combine matching tiles, and clear space with big combos.
But watch out, if the board fills up, it’s game over, and your capybara buddy might just lose his cool!

With colorful visuals and satisfying number-merging mechanics, Capybara Block Drop delivers endless strategic fun wrapped in a charming, lighthearted package.

title: Traffic Cop 3D
description: Traffic Cop 3D is a casual game where you play as a police officer enforcing the law of the road. Scan nearby drivers and use intel from the police database to decide whether you should pull them over, or let them go, all while progressing through the story and increasing your duties as a cop.

title: Gold Miner Classic
description: Jump into the most classic gold mining adventure ever! Gold Miner Classic brings you all the excitement of being a real gold miner. Feel into the perfect casual relaxation experience. Your mission is simple but incredibly satisfying.

title: Capybara Coin Master
description:
Capybara Coin Master is a cozy yet addictive incremental tycoon clicker game where every flip counts!

Start small by buying your first coin and flipping it for income—heads mean profit! As your fortune grows, hire adorable Capybara Coin Masters to flip coins for you, even while you relax. 
Upgrade your coins to higher quality for bigger rewards, and unlock powerful Coin Mastery to boost your team’s flipping skills.

Flip. Upgrade. Profit. Rule the coin empire with your capybara crew!

title: Craft of Wars
description: The war between the Reds and the Blues has never been more epic than in Craft of Wars! In this cubic game, you'll fight for strategic points on the map using a classic combat system similar to the one found in older versions of Minecraft. Prepare for intense sword and bow duels, TNT explosions, tactical use of potions, and the legendary golden apples that will help you survive the fiercest battles.

title: Gun Rush
description: Begin an action-packed gun battle runner. Gun Rush is an electrifying arcade game that combines gun merging with platform running. Run forward, avoid obstacles, collect weapons, and blast your way to the finish line with ultimate firepower. Control the direction of your gun, shooting power, ATK speed, and Range to increase its value. Increase your damage by using high-value doors.

title: Word of Fortune
description:
Guess the hidden 5-letter word, solving the clue and using spins of the letter wheel to get hints! You get 3 spins to reveal letters and 2 guesses to solve it. Win and earn your title, or miss, and you’re out! Each day brings a new puzzle, plus extra themed levels to explore.
This game is great for players of all ages, and it's a fun way to spend time and test vocabulary and mental abilities!

title: Italian Brainrot Quiz
description: Italian Brainrot Quiz is a chaotic meme-guessing game where you match bizarre names to iconic brainrot characters! From Tralalero Tralala to Bombardiro Crocodilo and Tung Tung Tung Sahur – can you guess them all? Each round is a wild ride through surreal Italian meme culture. Laugh, confuse your friends, and become the ultimate Brainrot Champion. Spaghetti logic guaranteed. Ready to play?

title: Terra Craft World
description: Terra Craft World invites you to explore an open world where every decision shapes your journey. Begin an unforgettable adventure filled with discovery and creativity. This game perfectly blends exploration, building, and survival mechanics into one exciting experience. Whether you enjoy creating structures or overcoming environmental dangers, every moment feels rewarding and dynamic. Discover more craft and building experiences packed with creativity and exploration fun!

title: Hidden Object Adventure
description: Are you ready to solve puzzles and uncover hidden secrets? Become a detective in Find Hidden Object Game and test your observation skills! Explore detailed scenes in schools, houses, amusement parks, and zoos. Search for cleverly hidden items, challenge your brain, and enjoy fun, relaxing gameplay. Perfect for casual players and puzzle lovers alike. Train your mind and become the ultimate detective!

title: Stick Master Teleport
description:
Jump onto walls, throw knives, and teleport to your enemies ⚔️ to defeat them with a single strike.
Prove your ninja reputation by eliminating bad guys before they even notice.
Walk the tough path of a ninja to become a true ninja assassin!

title: Garten Of BanBan 1 Escape
description:
Enter Banban's Kindergarten, and you're sure to make some friends. Explore the mysterious establishment and don't lose your life and sanity. Uncover the horrifying truth behind the place, but be careful, as you are far from alone…

The Banban And Friends Gang:
Banban’s Kindergarten has earned a special place in every kid’s heart. The reason for this is the Banban And Friends Gang, which are the establishment’s mascots and icons. At Banban’s Kindergarten, nobody’s lonely thanks to them!

title: Anna's Story: Dress Up DIY
description:
Style Anna’s outfits and bring her fairy tale story to life!

Anna's Story: Dress Up DIY takes you into a magical world of creativity and fashion! In this charming paper doll game, you’ll help Anna dress up for a variety of occasions, from costume parties and romantic dates to festive holidays like Halloween and Christmas.

title: Running In Foam
description: Welcome to the wonderful world of "Running In Foam"! Everything here is made of soft, colorful foam. You'll play as a cute character, racing through foam-filled tracks. You need to nimbly jump over giant foam obstacles, slide down slippery foam slides, and collect shiny gems to unlock new characters and power-ups. The game is fast-paced with fresh, adorable graphics, and every run is full of surprises and fun. Be careful not to get lost in the foam!

title: Xytrian Runner
description: Xytrian is an endless flight runner where you pilot a spaceship through a dangerous course. Dodge obstacles, score points, and survive as long as you can! Click to control your shuttle and hit the timing perfectly! Only precise altitude changes will let you overcome the obstacles ahead.

title: Dice Puzzle
description: Dice Puzzle is a smart, satisfying merge game where you place numbered dice on a grid to combine matches and build higher values. Plan ahead, manage limited space, and handle dice that appear solo or in pairs. Every move matters—chain merges, grow your numbers, and test your strategy in this addictive dice challenge.

title: Sneaker Art
description: Sneaker Art is a creative casual art game where you become a pro sneaker designer. Grab your paintbrush, unleash your imagination, and craft unique shoe designs. Choose from a variety of laces, showcase your artwork, and sell your masterpieces in your sneaker shop. Pack your custom sneakers in stylish boxes and grow your business with every sale!

title: Italian Brainrot Find the Differences
description: In this game you have to locate the differences between the two pictures in the limited amount of time given to play each time! To play, use your mouse as control. Make sure that you don’t make a mistake more than three times because that will make you fail. One minute is the total time you will play through the 20 levels in this game! In each level you have seven differences. Good luck!

title: Steal Brainrot Eggs
description: Steal Brainrot Eggs is a competitive action game playable in both 1 Player and 2 Player modes. Players buy eggs from a central conveyor, carry them to their Base, and hatch random Brainrot characters based on egg rarity. Characters generate coins over time, allowing access to higher-tier eggs. Defend your Base from thieves or steal eggs and characters from rivals, customize your character, raise evolving pets, and take part in timed events across the map.

title: Food Tower Defense
description: ? Welcome to Food Tower Defense – The Tastiest Tower Defense Ever! ?? Prepare your appetite and sharpen your strategy because Food Tower Defense is here to serve you the most delicious tower defense experience ever!

title: Zombie Survival
description: Play the nervous zombie adventure in Zombie Survival. Explore a dangerous world occupied by zombies. Collect various weapons to attack zombies. Move smartly and set traps to defend yourself from massive zombie waves. Explore abandoned cities, dark alleys, and creepy forests - each level is a new adventure! Challenge big zombie bosses and prove your survival skills under pressure! Collect many useful items to fix your broken tools.

title: SPRUNKI GETS SURGERY
description:
SPRUNKI GETS SURGERY ??

OREN, a genius (but reckless) surgeon, must save PINKI after a brutal facial injury—without anesthesia! As more SPRUNKIS like TUNNER, shot in the head, flood the ER, OREN races against time. But lurking in the shadows is BLACK, ready to turn OREN’s mission into a nightmare. Will OREN save them all, or will BLACK end it in tragedy?

title: Aqua Sort: Water Color Puzzle
description: Dive into the relaxing world of Aqua Sort: Water Color Puzzle! Your goal is simple: sort the colored liquids into the flasks until each flask contains only one color. With over 1000 levels and unique modes like Color Fusion, Mystery, and Time Trial, this puzzle game will test your logic and patience. Unlock new themes and achievements as you play!

title: Hero Tower War
description:
Many monsters and enemies in the tower. You need to defeat them, get treasures and save hostages.

You can play everywhere ,every time. It is a boring killer game.

title: Animal Blocks
description: Enter the colorful and cheerful world of Animal Blocks, where adorable creatures bring classic block puzzles to life. Match three or more of the same animal blocks to clear the board, earn points, and climb to higher scores. Simple to play yet full of fun challenges, this free online game is perfect for both mobile and desktop players who enjoy relaxing, strategic gameplay and charming visuals.

title: Room Sort
description: Welcome to Room Sort - Floor Plan Game, the ultimate free puzzle game that combines the fun of tangram puzzles with the creativity of home design. In this engaging game, you’ll rearrange room blocks to complete floor plans. Each room connects through doors, so you'll need to place them perfectly to create a cohesive layout.

title: Hill Climbing Mania
description: Drive over hilly tracks, collect stars, coins and pickups to upgrade your cars and get further! Also watch out for various obstacles! But you can also use them to perform some backflips... just watch your head! So, buckle up, driver! Drive from the start to finish in each level and collect coins to upgrade your cars.

title: 3D Basketball.io Dunk Sport
description: Sports Basketball is a thrilling 3D basketball game that will keep you entertained for hours. Whether you're a basketball fan or just love fast-paced Sports games Fun

title: Noob: Jailbreak 2
World Cup Soccer Caps
description: World Cup Soccer Caps is a fun and fast-paced tabletop-style soccer game where you control a team of caps, flicking them to pass, shoot, and score goals. Strategize your moves, outplay your opponent, and aim for victory in this exciting, skill-based challenge!

title: Parking Fury 3D: Night City
description:
Welcome to the adrenaline-filled world of Parking Fury 3D, where you'll be at the wheel of various vehicles navigating the bustling streets of a massive city.

Whether you're behind the wheel of a taxi or driving an ambulance through traffic to save lives, each mission presents its own challenges and rewards.

For those who dare, there is the exciting world of car theft missions. Take on the role of a skilled driver tasked with procuring specific vehicles under the cover of darkness.

title: Idle Trade Routes
description: Command a growing fleet of merchant ships across a shimmering ocean in Idle Trade Routes. Link bustling islands, auto‑dock at busy ports, and optimize trade lines to keep goods flowing. Unlock new ships, hire captains, and chase bigger contracts as your profits grow even while you’re away.

title: Pet Doctor Business Tycoon-Pet care game
description: Step into the world of animal care with Pet Doctor – Animal Hospital Simulator! Become a kind and skilled veterinarian as you treat adorable pets including cats, dogs, rabbits, and more. Use realistic medical tools to diagnose, clean wounds, check heartbeats, and perform surgeries. Each level brings new challenges where you must care for sick, injured, or pregnant animals in a friendly hospital environment.

title: MergeDuel.io
description: Merge Duel is a fast-paced 1v1 battle game where strategy and quick decisions lead to victory. Merge and upgrade your cannons to summon powerful units and counter your opponent in real time. Every match challenges your tactical skills as you adapt to new enemies and situations. Climb the ranks, dominate the leaderboard, and enjoy vibrant visuals, smooth controls, and intense duels from start to finish.

title: Only Up
description: Embark on an exhilarating journey from ground zero to the skies in Only Up! However, there's a twist – there are no checkpoints on this ascent. Stumble, and you must swiftly catch yourself to avoid losing precious progress. Will you conquer the summit, or succumb to the challenge and give up?

title: Digital Circus Find The Differences
description:
Step into the whimsical and wacky world of Digital Circus: Find The Differences, where fun meets challenge! Explore vibrant and surreal circus scenes filled with unique characters and zany details, all while sharpening your observation skills. Can you spot the subtle changes between two seemingly identical pictures?
Put your eyes to the test and discover how many differences you can find in this exciting puzzle adventure!

title: Dynamons 8
description:
Embark on a brand new Dynamons adventure in Dynamons 8! This online monster collecting game includes two fresh areas to explore; Chinese Festival world and the bonus cave.

Seasoned Dynamons connoisseur Jovani will tell you everything you need to know to become a true Dynamon Captain. Encounter Robocanyx, Jaxaguar, Sauryx, Dagaryx and Tydonyx and many more special Dynamons. Recruit them for your team and beat others in thrilling 1v1 battles with special attacks and power-ups.

title: Match Collection
description: Collect 3 of the same items from the shelf to erase them. When a shelf is empty, the shelf above it falls down. You can have up to 7 items, and when your hand is full, the game is over. When all items are erased, the stage is cleared.

title: Word Cross
description:
Word Cross is an excellent way to loosen up and relax your mind.
Find as many hidden words as you can and improve your vocabulary everyday!

Word Cross combines classic crossword with a modern twist, offering hours of fun and brain-boosting challenges.

► Features:
     ◆ 6000+ challenging levels.
     ◆ Well designed grass & wooden theme.
     ◆ Dictionary: Expand your vocabulary!
     ◆ Hint and other boosters: magnifying glasses, firecrackers.
     ◆ No time limit, no pressure.

title: Witch Craft Potion Sort
description: Step into the witch’s lair this Halloween night and test your skills in a spooky potion puzzle! Sort the eerie liquids, mix glowing brews, and fill each cauldron with the right color to complete your craft.

title: Match 3D Puzzle Saga
description: Ready to match and collect? Solve puzzles to earn coins, unlock powerful power-ups and complete daily challenges to grab extra rewards and sweet bonuses. The more you play, the more opportunities you have to boost your score!

title: One Line Drawing
description: Welcome to One Line Drawing, a game that brings together a variety of line drawing gameplays. You can relax through relaxing line drawing gameplay, or challenge yourself through puzzle-type line drawing gameplay.

title: Simon Super Rabbit
description:
Simon and his friends have turned into superheroes and now they must look for the evil Professor Wolf and get their marbles back.
Grrr… That boastful and braggart Professor Wolf and his minions don’t want to give the marbles back to Simon and they have challenged him to a super mega competition which he must win to get them back. If you beat him, he will be giving the marbles back to you. Surely you can win and get them all back. Go for it!

title: Fish Feeding
description: Nobody can stop you, but you are not the only fish in the sea: you will have to avoid the vicious sharks that wander in the deepest, darkest depths, looking for a nice little fish to eat! See how high you can score!

title: Incredible Kids Dentist
description: This is a dentist game for kids. Have you ever wanted to be a dentist? If this was your dream before, you should not miss this game. In this educational game, you can become a doctor in a hospital. You need to check the teeth of your patients.

title: Stickman vs Zombies: Epic Fight
description:
The zombie apocalypse has begun today!

Stickman vs Zombies: Epic Fight is an epic stick fighting game with cool effects and combos in the platformer genre.

The most epic battles and fights await you in a cube world similar to minecraft, where the red stick fights against zombies, skeleton archers, withers and even Noob!

The game is similar to Stick War, Stickman vs Zombies and Stickman Warriors. Hordes of zombies attacked the red stick and his friends!

title: HOTGEAR
description:
Join HOTGEAR, a brand-new racing game where the thrill of the chase is just beginning. The pursuit is on, and it's time to put your skills to the test! The game offers a wide range of customization options, allowing you to create the car of your dreams and make every chase even more thrilling.
So, what are you waiting for, racer? The pursuit has begun, and you're wanted! Time to get in the driver's seat, customize your car, and take on the streets!

title: Pato Vs Cops
description: lay Pato Vs Cops — the ultimate free browser police chase game! No download needed — jump into nonstop car chases, dodge roadblocks, and outdrive relentless cops in fast-paced arcade action. Perfect for fans of unblocked racing games, endless car chase games, and online driving challenges. Show off your reflexes, collect power-ups, and see how long you can survive the heat in this thrilling high-speed pursuit!

title: Racing Car Destroying Zombie
description:
Zombie Racing Car fast-paced physics-based racing game. You’re in for the ride of your life through a zombie apocalypse!

Drive your car through deserts, forests, abandoned city,...surrounded by zombies, earn cash, upgrade your car powerful ones. Steer your car to keep balance on the hills while trying to smash zombies into debris. It's you against a boatload of super-strong zombies!

title: Big Block Blast
description:
Place triangles and blocks to build 2x2 BIG BLOCKS! Drag and drop shapes into the grid to complete full squares made of triangles. Matching colors gives you bonus points, so in Big Block Blast you must aim for smart and colorful combos!
Some blocks have special powers and can even be placed on top of others. Use them strategically to unlock new moves and clear space. Big Block Blast is a simple to play game but tricky to master! How many BIG BLOCKS can you make?

title: Powerwash Simulator - 3D Wash
description: There’s no stain too tough, no dirt too thick that you can’t handle. So gear up, point your washer, and get ready to bring the shine back to everything around you.

title: Cat Sorter Puzzle
description:
A total cat chaos! These fluffy troublemakers have spread over different seats and are waiting for someone clever enough to stack them by color.

Use your focus and logical thinking to get the best results in this contemplative game.

title: Push It 3D
description: Push It 3D is a casual online game of pushing boxes for free. The game adopts a 3D perspective, presenting a complicated puzzle-solving process for players. You need to push the boxes in the game to complete tasks, and only push them to the specified position can you go to the next level. The game has multiple levels for you to challenge. If you are interested, come and challenge it!

title: 2048Skill Edition
description: Ini adalah permainan kesenangan untuk 2.048, dan terutama kami telah menambahkan permainan dan keterampilan baru yang memungkinkan pengguna untuk mengalami 2048 berbeda.

title: Hippo Supermarket
description: Meet Jack Ma, a cute hippo who dreams of opening his own supermarket. But he doesn't know how to do it. He needs your help to make his dream come true.In this fun and addictive game, you need to merge the same items to get higher-level items, and then sell them to earn money. The more money you make, the more you can help Jack Ma build his store.

title: MMA Super Fight
description: The crowd is roaring, the spotlight is on you. From rookie to legend — face endless fights, unlock unique fighters and upgrade power, defense, health and regeneration. With every match, the pressure rises. The ring never sleeps and neither can you.

title: Scary Shawarma Kiosk: The Anomaly
description: This is a first-person psychological horror game where you work night shifts in a small street kiosk. What seems like a normal job quickly turns into a nightmare: customers grow increasingly strange, and reality itself begins to warp. Some people just want to eat — others are only pretending to be human.

title: Ace Car Racing
description: Ace Car Racing offers high-octane city-avoidance action. Choose from sleek 3D modern sports cars across Seaside Roads, Exotic, City Racing, and Desert Trip. Collect lightning items for fuel, coins for upgrades, or splurge on new cars. Remember: diamonds unlock special vehicles. Invest in a superior car upfront and fine-tune its Acceleration, Max Speed, Wind Resistance, and Nitrogen. Skip the starter car—your race to victory awaits!

title: Mini Golf Saga
description: Embark on an immersive golf adventure with Mini Golf Saga, a captivating 3D mini-golf game set against the backdrop of a picturesque beach, featuring diverse golf levels where precision is key to achieving the lowest hit count for a high score; facing limited hits per level, strategize your shots wisely and, when needed, watch a rewarded video ad to replenish your chances and continue the saga of sun-soaked golfing excitement.

title: Fruit Catcher
description:
Catch as many fruits as you can before they fall! ?
Move your basket left and right to collect fresh fruits and avoid rotten ones. Each fruit gives you points — how high can your score go?
This fun and colorful game tests your reflexes and speed. Perfect for kids and casual players who love simple but addictive gameplay!

title: The Wall
description:
Here's the Wall - thanks to it, you can gain a lot, but you can also lose a lot!
Bet on the zones, answer the questions and win the prizes that the balls will draw for you!

Our quiz contains the most puzzles among trivia games.
Feel real emotions, face the Wall!

title: Roller Coaster Rush
description:
Speed through tracks in Roller Coaster Rush! Play free and online in this thrilling coaster game.

Roller Coaster Rush is an exhilarating 3D game that puts you in control of a speeding roller coaster. Your goal is to accelerate through the tracks without crashing, performing crazy jumps and navigating steep drops. Hold to speed up and release to slow down just in time. Each level challenges your timing and precision as you rush through colorful and thrilling environments.

title: Jelly-Belly. Make the Elephant
description: It is a puzzle like "Watermelon game" where you need drop animals in a container and try not to cross the top line. Animals of the same type will combine and create a larger animal. Merge the animals to create the biggest animal - Elephant.

title: VegaMix Da Vinci Puzzles
description: "VegaMix Da Vinci Puzzles" is a match-3 adventure with quests and an interactive story. After a time-machine failure, Alice, Vika, and Lesha end up in Renaissance Italy and meet Leonardo da Vinci. To return home, they must help him finish his inventions, recover lost blueprints, and uncover secrets hidden in his workshop while exploring the art-filled cities and palaces of 15th-century Italy.

title: Car Factory For Kids
description: Build and race your dream car in Car Factory For Kids! This exciting experience combines creativity, assembly, and racing into one fun-packed adventure, making it a perfect pick for young fans of car games for kids. This playful kids car game experience brings together building and racing in a fun and interactive way. Easy controls are perfect for free car game lovers.

title: Dalgona Game2
description:
There's a cute shape on the dalgona, a snack from the past.
Be careful not to break the shape.
It's complete if you take it out nicely in a pretty way to go!

title: Celebrity E-Girl Vibes
description: Step into the world of edgy street style with Celebrity E-Girl Vibes!  This game lets you dress up celebrities in the bold, trendy looks that define E-Girl fashion. Experiment with colorful hairstyles, graphic eyeliner, oversized hoodies, crop tops, ripped jeans, plaid skirts, chokers, and statement accessories. Pair each look with vibrant makeup and nail polish to complete the vibe.

title: Hidden Object: Emily's Case
description:
A detective adventure set in Victorian London.

Search for hidden objects, uncover clues, and investigate the disappearance of a young girl. Solve puzzles, play mini-games, and step by step reveal the secrets of the old city.

title: Witch & Fairy BFF
description: Two unusual girlfriends - a Fairy and a Witch - study together, although they are so different. Fairy, with her delicate pink outfits and impeccable sense of style, is always ready to offer fashion tips and create vivid images. Her girlfriend-Witch, who prefers a Gothic style, chooses mysterious and gloomy outfits. Players will be able to help both heroines choose outfits for various events. Join magical friends in their exciting fashion adventure where style and magic go hand in hand!

title: Phone Case Diy 5
description: Phone Case DIY 5 is a popular Art Game. For children who like this series very much, you must be eager to play this game! In this new DIY phone case game, we changed the style of the game, changing the previous 2D style to the current 3D style. At the same time, we have also added patterns, decorations, stickers, etc. that can be selected. At the same time, we have also added an album function, you can save your masterpieces to the album, and you can view your own artworks at any time.

title: Savage Defenders
description: A tower defense strategy action game where you become the last hope of a tribe living at the foot of an ancient volcano. When an asteroid with an alien threat falls to the planet, you must combine magic, tactics and the strength of warriors to stop the invader who is devouring all life.

title: High Heels Collect Run
description: Ready to begin a stylish running adventure in High Heels Collect Run! In this casual game, you’ll run through various fun environments. Stepping on heels can make you feel like a queen! Everyone loves to look perfect, and these heels will make you shine like a star!

title: Noob vs Zombie Apocalypse: shooting pro
description:
Post-apocalypse! Noob finds himself alone against zombies. Passing levels, he accumulates coins and picks up weapons.
There is a grenade launcher, a pistol, an uzi, a shotgun, a machine gun, a laser pistol, a rifle, a laser rifle - and so on!

Noob vs Zombie Apocalypse: shooting pro is an epic noob game in the world, similar to minecraft fnaf. Noob shoots at zombies with a variety of weapons like a rambo. Noob miner starts his fighting fnaf survival!

There are 60 levels and 15 bosses in total!

title: Jigsaw Cards: Daily Puzzles
description:
Jigsaw Cards: Daily Puzzles is a relaxing jigsaw-style puzzle game where you assemble beautiful images piece by piece. Enjoy a calming experience as each picture comes to life under your fingertips!
Who It's For
Ideal for puzzle lovers, casual players, and anyone who enjoys peaceful, visually pleasing gameplay.

title: Find 6 Differences – Spot the Hidden Changes!
description: Put your observation skills to the test in Find 6 Differences, a fun and relaxing puzzle game! With 20 unique levels, each featuring two nearly identical images, your goal is simple: find the 6 differences before time runs out! 20 challenging levels with beautifully designed images and engaging gameplay that sharpens your attention to detail. Hint system to help you when you're stuck.

title: Hydro Racing 3D
description: Would you like to participate in a great boat racing game with Hydro Racing 3D? Not only racing but also lots of free map activities and exciting career mode chapters are waiting. The boats are shiny and faster than each other. The nitrous fuel makes them faster and stronger. Get in your place in the water parkour and start either racing or free driving in single or 2 player mode. Let the speedboat adventure begin!

title: Grab Them All
description: Grab Them All is your ticket to thrilling fun as you take down robbers by putting them in the trap! Explore diverse traps on each level and get rid of all the robbers.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Boxing Stars
description: Boxing Stars is a 2D fighting game featuring several characters and tournaments to fight in. Choose your fighter and punch, dodge, and block your way to the championship.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Block Pixels
description:
Block Pixels is a vibrant puzzle game where classic block-clearing action meets the creative joy of pixel art discovery.

Your main goal is to strategically place colorful pieces to clear lines on the board. But the real magic lies in what you clear. Each block you eliminate contributes to a larger masterpiece. Clearing specific colors helps you build and reveal dozens of charming hidden images, from cute animals to fun objects.

title: King of Cash Business Idle
description: How much money can you make in business? Can you fight off the competition?
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Poptropica
description:
Join millions of players in the adventures of Poptropica!
Complete unbelievable quests, written by Jeff Kinney, author of the Diary of a Wimpy Kid series!
Customize your character and adopt pets! Decorate your clubhouse and hang out with friends! There's so much to do in Poptropica!
And don't forget to collect prizes and compete with your friends - will you be the island champion?

title: Panda Dash Auto Shooting
description: Jump straight into explosive action with Panda Dash Auto Shooting! In this fast-paced side-scrolling shooting adventure, you guide a fearless panda warrior into chaotic arenas packed with endless zombie waves. Each battle throws you into intense combat where survival depends on positioning and strategy. Every round feels stronger, faster, and more thrilling than the last! Get ready, grab your gear, and dash into zombie chaos!

title: Tricky Arrow
description: Get ready to sharpen your skills in Tricky Arrow! Test your precision and reflexes as you shoot arrows at a spinning circle target. Aim for the bullseye and avoid hitting other arrows. With each twist and spin, the challenge grows, requiring strategy and accuracy. Simple yet addictive gameplay for all ages.

title: Steal Brainrot Duel
description: Steal Brainrot Duel is a fast, competitive collector-raider where you hunt for the best brainrot characters, defend your base from thieves, and outsmart rivals in Solo or 2 Player mode. Start with simple picks like Noobini Pizzanini, then grind your economy to unlock rare and legendary favorites such as Tralalero Tralala, Cocofanto Elefanto, and Graipussi Medussi. Build income, raid others, protect your stash, and style your obby avatar with hats, glasses, backpacks, wings, outfits, and pets!

title: Evolve
description: Evolve is a clicker-incremental game about evolving civilization from molecule elements.  Release Date December 2018  Developer Evolve was developed by Peter Motschmann.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Laundry Rush
description: Laundry Rush is a business simulation game where you must run your laundry business so it can be successful. Clean and deliver the dirty laundry from clothes to shoes.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Lulu's Fashion World
description: Lulu's Fashion World is a beauty game where you dress-up Lulu, collect fashion items, and be the top fashion designer. Do some experiments and create unique fashion trends!
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Horror Minecraft Partytime
description: Horror Minecraft Partytime is a spooky and interesting horror survival game. This time you will enter a familiar world of blocks. In this hide-and-seek mode, you will be the pursuer, looking for every corner. Find the weirdo in disguise and catch him.

title: Merge Battle Tactics
description: Merge Battle Tactics is a thrilling merge battle game where you command an army of unique monsters. Merge identical creatures to unleash their full potential and strategically position them for combat against your foes.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Algerian Solitaire
description: Algerian Solitaire is a variation on the classic Solitaire (or Patience, as it is also known) card game. It is played using two decks of card, and the rules are quite complex.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Papa's Pancakeria
description: Papa’s Pancakeria is a casual restaurant game in which you grill pancakes and serve them with delicious toppings to customers. As you progress, you play minigames and upgrade the shop.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Classic Mine Sweeper
description: Dive back into "Mine Sweeper Classic," the ultimate nostalgic puzzle game from the Windows XP era, perfect for strategic gameplay during any downtime. Challenge yourself with levels from beginner to expert and relive the excitement of this timeless classic.

title: Punchers
description: Punchers is a 3D boxing sports action game with ragdoll physics. Use move keys to dodge enemy punches and hit back with random punch combinations.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Social Solitaire
description: Social Solitaire is a free solitaire game featuring a relaxed and normal game mode. Using the points you earn in games, you can customize your deck and theme.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Cat Escape - Hide and Seek
description: Help adorable cats escape detection in this charming stealth puzzle game. Play as a tiny cat navigating through giant household environments, hiding behind objects and solving puzzles to avoid being caught. Use timing, strategy, and quick thinking to find the perfect hiding spots and escape routes.

title: Monster Puzzle
description: Monster Puzzle is a driving game where you collect puzzle pieces in the arena in order to unlock new elements and new vehicles in the arena. The game strikes a balance between being neither too complicated nor too easy.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: SkillWarz
description: SkillWarz is a fast-paced first-person shooter offering advanced movement mechanics and diverse game modes like Deathmatch, Gun Game, and Skull Hunt. Navigate through dynamic day and night maps featuring bounce pads, teleports, and battle pickups.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Tower Defense Dragon Merge
description: Experience Tower Defense: Dragon Merge, a thrilling clash of strategy and chaos for hours of unique gameplay. Spin for PowerUps in the in-game shop, expanding your arsenal as you level up to combat invaders. In the frenzy of the alien assault, mash the cannon button for more firepower. Reinforce castle walls and fortify defenses through upgrades for a fighting chance against the relentless onslaught. Face the challenge, strengthen your defenses, and enjoy an exciting blend of strategy and chaos!

title: Obby Prison: Craft Escape
description: The game that will test your survival instincts and creativity. Will you be able to escape from prison? Survive and escape!

title: World Solitaire -Tripeaks-
description:
It is TriPeaks, one of the most famous solitaires in the world.
Take a step to go up and test your brain and luck
How far can I clean it?

title: Block TNT Blast
description: Block TNT Blast is an exciting sandbox simulation game that will ignite your imagination and strategic skills. In this game, players are tasked with strategically placing bombs to demolish various objects and earn diamonds. These diamonds are then used to unlock a wide range of powerful bombs, adding to the explosive mayhem. With its captivating gameplay and stunning graphics, Block TNT Blast offers endless hours of entertainment for players of all ages.

title: Bicycle Kick Champ
description: Bicycle Kick Champ is an arcade game where you have one purpose - bicycle kick the ball into the goal! Time your shots perfectly to make sure they aren't blocked and aim to get the highest score as you keep hitting those passes into the net.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Supermarket Cashier Simulator
description:
Practice being the best cashier in the supermarket. Become a mathematician by calculating and entering prices of grocery items and giving change to your customers. By playing you also improve your mathematical skills with the calculator in the game. This game is suitable to be played by adults or teenagers.

With the supermarket cashier game, you will improve your skills and concentration in calculating and also increase your level of accuracy.

title: Line Driver
description: Line Driver is a puzzle game where you draw the lines and ride them on a sled. Classic and super addictive game is backGive flight to your imagination, the game is designed for creative people who do not like the game by the standard, but prefer to enjoy their creativity!
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: From Nerds to Beauties
description: Two girlfriends, the Little Mermaid and Arlene, embark on a world of stylish transformation. Their appearance, full of flaws, requires magical intervention. In the first stage of the game, the girls go through a series of fun cosmetic procedures that give them glowing skin and luxurious hair. At the second stage, you will have to become a stylist, choosing hairstyles, fashionable clothes and accessories. Each of your actions brings the heroines closer to their dream of becoming real beauties!

title: Wordling: Daily Word Challenge
description: Wordling is a fun, free daily word puzzle game where you guess the hidden word in 6 tries using color-coded clues. Perfect for adults and seniors who love brain games, spelling challenges, and relaxing, ad-free gameplay. Explore all game modes!

title: Lode Retro Adventure
description: Relive the classic fun of Lode Retro Adventure, a 2D pixel game that will make you dig for gold. You will play as a gold miner who must collect a certain amount of gold coins in each level. You will use your shovel to break the ground tiles and trap the purple monsters, but be careful, they can escape and chase you. You will also find other treasures such as golden bananas that will boost your score. Lode Retro Adventure is a game that will test your strategy. Can you collect all the gold coins?

title: Craft World
description: Craft World: Building Games is the new builder simulator where everything is limited only by your imagination! Build various houses of more than 300 unique blocks and decorate the rooms with various decor and furniture!
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Happy Glass Game
description: Happy Glass is a fun and engaging puzzle game where your goal is to fill an empty glass with water. Draw lines to create a path for the water to flow into the glass. The less you draw, the higher your score. With 80 challenging levels, you’ll need to use your creativity and logic to make the glass happy again. Enjoy this delightful game on both desktop and mobile devices!

title: Duck Hunting Open Season
description: Are you ready to go on an exciting adventure in the heart of nature with Duck Hunting: Open Season? In this addictive matching game, your goal is to pass challenging levels by collecting bullets and shooting ducks.Make items of the same type explode by combining them in groups of three or more. Your goal is to collect bullets and hunt ducks. Also use various power-ups such as Explosives, rockets and special hammers to create bigger explosions and go faster. Have Fun!

title: Real Flight Simulator
description: Real Flight Simulator plays like an airplane driving simulation game with 3D models. In 6 levels, you can learn how to drive an airplane including starting, steering, and landing. All of the complicated instrument panels are simplified for players to learn. The more expensive the airplane you drive, the better acceleration of it you can enjoy including the Power, Speed, Solution, and Brake. Good luck in the sky!

title: Power Badminton
description: Power Badminton is an exhilarating game where you'll face off against skilled opponents in intense badminton matches. Utilize strategic shots, activate power-ups, and outmaneuver your rival on the court.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Amazing Strange Rope Police
description: Amazing Strange Rope Police Vice Spider is a fantastic action city simulator game in which you control a superhero like Spider-Man. How to Play Amazing Strange Rope Police Vice SpiderYou can choose to become a superhero and save the day, or you can be the bad guy and become a supervillain instead!
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Gladiators. Merge and Fight
description: Gladiators: Merge and Fight is an engaging arcade game that combines character attribute creation and enhancement with combat. In this game, you start with basic materials and improve your gladiator's attributes by upgrading weapon, shield, armor, and helmet materials. Every decision affects your hero's stats. After preparing your gladiator, press the "Start" button to begin the second part of the game: arena battles.

title: Man Runner 2048
description: Man Runner 2048 is a casual arcade game where your objective is to run and merge men till you reach 2048. Your goal is to get the highest score on each round, because at the end of the level, you will get a chance to shoot a giant monster.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Pocket Car Master
description:
Pocket Car Master: The Ultimate Car Puzzle Game
Collect and merge parts to make your own robot car. Park it in the matching area and fight other robots. No time limit, just fun. Upgrade your car with coins and unlock more cars. Try and play now!

title: War Robots Battles
description: Enter the future battlefield, and lead your powerful robots in exciting battles. War Robots Battles lets you feel the most exciting robot action. You can attack with powerful weapons and use strategy to win. Choose your robot, equip powerful weapons, and build the strongest combat team. Choose from wind sword, imperial bow, etc.

title: Taz Mechanic Simulator
description: Taz Mechanic Simulator is a superb game in which you can test out your mechanical skills and build your very own car! If you love mechanics and cars, you will love Taz Mechanic Simulator - this game is immersive and allows you to practically build a car from scratch - you can add all the different parts of the vehicle such as frame, coils, tires, engine and body panels.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Slinger Block
description: Guide a red square through compact grid-based puzzles filled with sliding blocks and locked paths. Clear the way, collect every yellow key, unlock the yellow door, and reach the exit to win. Simple rules, clever layouts, and satisfying logic challenges make each level a fun brain teaser.

title: Coffee Match: Block Puzzle
description: Coffee Match: Block Puzzle is a fast-paced sorting challenge where your mission is to match coffee cups to their trays before time runs out. Slide trays, sort cups, and think fast as each level ramps up the difficulty.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Happy Monsters 2
description:
A bundle of fun games designed for children of all ages that will delight everyone!

Our little monsters love to play all sorts of games where you collect coins. Help them gather as many as possible to unlock all the toys. Complete the entire toy collection!

title: Puzzle Blocks Classic
description: Get ready for an addictive block puzzle challenge! Drag and drop colorful blocks to clear lines and rack up points. Think ahead, make big matches, and unleash powerful Super Blocks to crush multiple lines at once! Stuck? Use boosters to keep the game going. With three chances to clear the center, aim for the highest score and climb the global leaderboard. Easy to play, hard to master—can you become the ultimate puzzle champion? Let the block-dropping fun begin!

title: Ludo Star League
description: Enter the arena of strategy and chance. Choose your favorite mode, unlock stylish dice skins, and climb the trophy road.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Dot by Dot
description:
Dot By Dot is a relaxing puzzle game where you have to connect dots into lines and get amazing drawings. Once you connect all the dots and lines, the drawing will be automatically colored! Enjoy the addictive puzzle game!
Let the Dot by Dot game develop your creativity and skills. Draw a line, connect colored dots and see what kind of drawing you get.

title: DTA: Best Thief
description:
Can you steal everything without getting caught? Test your agility and cunning!
In "GTA: Top Thief" you will find:

- Lots of shops and difficulties with different goods
- Smart administrators – be careful!
- Improve your skills - become stealthier and faster
- Steal from sprunky, roblox and granny
- Go through the story with exciting quests
- Collect pets and stand out among thieves

Each successful heist brings you closer to the title of the best thief in "GTA: Top Thief"!

title: Find The Missing Part
description: With 100 levels of increasingly challenging puzzles, this game will put your observation skills to the test like never before. Your task is to carefully examine the image and identify the missing sections from a set of 15 options provided. With only seconds to spare, you must make swift and accurate selections to complete the puzzle.

title: Grenade Simulator
description: Begin the most explosive simulator experience ever. Grenade Simulator is an adrenaline-pumping explosion simulator where you can freely throw grenades, drop mines, and trigger massive blasts. This isn’t just a casual game.

title: Stickman Kombat 2D
description: Adrenaline unleashed! Rage, speed, and chaos collide in explosive 2D battles. Feel every hit — and dive into the madness. Are you ready?

title: Street Racer 2
description: Street Racer 2 is a driving drag-racing game where your goal is to win races, upgrade, and buy new cars. This game offers an exhilarating mix of play modes, including drag racing, off-road challenges, and arcade-style fun.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Chrome Cars Garage
description: Dive into the world of car mechanics in this engaging hidden object game. After inheriting your grandpa's global network of garages, you take on the role of the new owner, with your Uncle Joe guiding you through the intricacies of the trade. Explore various locations, uncover hidden car parts, and learn the art of automotive repair.

title: Cougar Simulator: Big Cats
description: Cougar Simulator: Big Cats is a simulation game that lets you step into the wild as a powerful cougar in a vast open-world adventure! Experience life as a big cat, hunting to feed yourself and your growing family, exploring beautiful landscapes, and upgrading your skills along the way.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Dusty Maze Hunter
description:
Dusty Maze Hunter beckons you to a distinctive maze adventure, blending puzzle-solving with strategic gameplay.

Tailored for puzzle enthusiasts and casual gamers, it promises an exhilarating journey through labyrinthine rooms filled with diverse obstacles. As you progress through multiple levels, you'll have the chance to refine your problem-solving skills and strategic thinking.

Are you prepared to unleash your strategy and triumph over the dust? The maze adventure awaits!

title: Burger Cafe
description: Burger Cafe is a fun and engaging interactive cafe simulator where you step into the role of a chef and entrepreneur. Build your dream burger restaurant while crafting delicious meals and keeping your customers happy!
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Four Colors
description: Four Colors lets you play the popular card game for free in your web browser. Your objective is to be the first player with no cards, similar to other Crazy Eights-style card games.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Growmi
description: Growmi is a platformer puzzle game where you solve puzzles to regain power. Your character has a limited set of moves that increase over time as you clear more areas of the game.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Sid & Ginny Y2K Glam Clash
description: Welcome to the Y2K style fashion world! Two charismatic heroines are waiting for you, ready to try on fashion trends from the 2000s. Create spectacular makeup for them with lip gloss, shining shadows and glossy skin; choose stylish hairstyles - from smooth straight hair to playful ponytails and fashionable hairpins. Experiment with low-cut jeans, crop tops, mini skirts, shiny fabrics, and bold combinations. Complete the resulting image with iconic accessories of those years.

title: Open 100 Doors
description: Open 100 Doors is a puzzle game where you must find a way to find and open doors. There are a lot of tricky doors with interesting puzzles you must solve.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Sprinter
description: Sprinter is a simple running game from the Flash era. Beat all of your opponents in a 100-meter sprint.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Bubble Plopper
description: In Bubble Plopper you can either try to prevent the bubbles from filling the playfield in Classic mode or try to clear the playfield within the given time in Time attack mode. Shooting bubbles has never been so fun. Plop plop!

title: World Wars 2
description: World Wars 2 is a strategy game that lets you command an army to fight in a war. Like in all wars, your goal is to be the last army standing in this free-for-all between you and up to 7 other CPU-controlled nations.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Russian Treasure Hunter
description: You're a prospector in a big mining town: grab your device, head to a location, and search for hidden items. As your device's signal grows, you're near a treasure trove; dig up a find and take it back to town to sell. The game combines tactical exploration, economics, and collecting: clever backpack management, purchasing upgrades, and choosing the right moment to return to town determine whether you'll make a profit or leave empty-handed.

title: Jackal Zombie Survival
description: Jackal Zombie Survival is a high-energy shooter that puts you behind the wheel as a lone survivor carving a path through a collapsing world. You charge through relentless undead swarms, unleash upgraded rides, and refine devastating abilities.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Crazy Tunnel
description: Crazy Tunnel is a fast-paced, first-person arcade game. Navigate through the tunnel at breakneck speeds and aim for the longest distance possible.

title: Lazy Workers
description: The employees in the office have started slacking off and everyone is asleep. As the boss, you need to get the office back up and running. To do this, use your mouse and send employees to rows of desks. Move workers so they do not bump into each other. Your job will get a little more difficult with each level. If you cannot pass the level, you can use the option to skip the level.

title: Pocket Zone
description: Pocket Zone is a gripping simulation game that challenges you to survive in a post-apocalyptic world. Venture to the Chernobyl nuclear power plant and fulfill your deepest desires with the legendary Performer of Dreams.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: My Farm
description: Become the proud owner of your very own farm! Grow crops, tend to animals, catch fish, and set up production. Assemble collections of exotic animals in the zoo, meet the mysterious visitors, and embark on thrilling adventures!

title: Egg Hunt Mania
description: Get your basket ready and save all the eggs you can from a terrible fate. Make sure to empty a full basket into the store. Watch out for the rising quota for eggs each day!

title: Earn to Die: Zombie Ride
description: Drive your car through hordes of zombies as you journey across a post-apocalyptic world.An evacuation attempt has failed, and your only chance of survival lies beyond a city overrun by the undead.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Egg Adventure: Mirror World
description: Mr. Egg accidentally entered the Mirror World. In this world, all the challenges in each level look the same with Egg Adventure 2, but the ways to pass them are different. Use your wisdom to help Mr. Egg bravely pass every level!

title: Mask Evolution 3d
description: Mask Evolution 3D is a parkour game. Move the masks through digital gates to boost the value of your mask. You can also collect decorations and attendants to make your mask even more artistic. Finally, auction your masks to sell them for a high price and earn more money. Please note,be careful of obstacles such as spikes on the road, they will devalue your mask and you will fail when your mask value is 0. Get ready for an exciting journey to make your very own mask!

title: Anime Couple: Avatar Maker
description: Anime Couple: Avatar Maker is your ultimate creative escape into the world of anime character design. Craft stunning anime couples with romantic flair, dress up stylish girl avatars, and mix and match accessories, hairstyles, and outfits.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Match Masters
description: Match Masters is a real-time multiplayer match-3 puzzle game where players compete head-to-head on the same board. Each move requires strategic thinking, as it can benefit both you and your opponent. Utilize unique boosters, participate in tournaments, and climb the global leaderboards in this dynamic and engaging game.

title: Meow Slide
description: Meow Slide is a brain training puzzle, entertain your brain for minutes or hours with endless challenges. The Meow Slide puzzle is simple: slide blocks left or right to create and clear full lines.

title: Kitty Clicker
description: Kitty Clicker is a fast-paced clicker game where you click to pet adorable cats and collect cat coins! Each pet earns coins, which you can use to unlock upgrades, treats, and toys to boost your earnings.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Energy Factory Idle
description: Energy Factory Idle is a relaxing idle factory game where you build and upgrade your own energy production system. Start with a small generator and turn it into a powerful factory by hiring workers, improving speed and output, and unlocking new generators. Your factory keeps working even while offline, letting you collect rewards and grow step by step. Simple controls, smooth progression, and a calm idle tycoon experience—perfect for short or long play sessions.

title: Fish It Now
description: Dive into an exciting fishing adventure with this fun and dynamic game where every cast counts!Catch Fish with Just One TapCast your line, wait for a bite, and reel in your catch just like real fishing.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Kung-Fu Little Animals
description: In this game you will become the new assistant of the Great Master. Your task is to teach funny and dexterous animals the art of kung fu. With simple clicks, you will train your newly minted students so that they become worthy successors of the Great Master's work. Passing the game, you will discover new funny animals, as well as new beautiful and unusual locations. Join the kung fu team and have fun teaching the little animals martial arts!

title: Stickman King
description: Stickman King is an action-packed arcade adventure where you guide a brave stickman through four distinct biomes. Face relentless enemies and defeat powerful bosses to prove your strength.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Drift.io
description: Drift.io is a fast-paced multiplayer car battle and racing game. Fight other players with rockets, freezing laser beams, and bouncy explosives in Battle game mode, or race others in exciting matches while dodging deadly items in Grand Prix game mode.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Flip Bottle
description: Flip Bottle is a simple but challenging one-button game. Flip the bottle and make it jump from object to object to reach the final platform.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Empire Clicker
description: Empire Clicker is a clicker game where you transform an empty plot of land into a thriving metropolis. Unleash your city-building skills as your settlement evolves into a bustling, dynamic cityscape.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Port Shipping Tycoon
description: Embark on a thrilling adventure as you build your own shipping empire in this addictive tile-flipping game! With just one click, start constructing your port business by flipping tiles to supply resources to bustling ports around the world.

title: Paint Master
description: Fill the squares to match the sample pattern. Tap the brush to paint a straight line of squares in one move. When your moves reach zero the game is over, so use them carefully to clear the stage!

title: Queens Royal: Sudoku Puzzle
description: Queens Royal: Sudoku Puzzle reimagines the classic eight queens challenge into a sleek logic game with over 5,000 levels. Place queens strategically so none share a row, column, or color zone while avoiding attacks in all directions. With elegant visuals, daily challenges, endless mode, and smart hints, every puzzle offers a unique test of reasoning and precision for players who enjoy refined brain-teasers.

title: Sort Balls - Cones
description: Immerse yourself in a calming logic puzzle where your goal is to sort colored balls into separate tubes. Plan each move carefully so that every tube contains balls of only one color. The straightforward mechanics gradually evolve into more challenging levels that test your focus and strategic thinking.

title: Barry Prison Hide And Seek
description: Begin an exciting escape game in the Barry Prison: Hide And Seek! Enter an exciting and challenging prison environment. You’ll join in a nervous game of hide and seek. Enjoy the fun role-playing. As the obby or Barry. Will you play as a brave escapee, or will you be the cold-hearted guard? Begin an exciting game of “hide and seek”, successfully hide and collect seals to defeat the boss, or find all the hidden escapees to stop their plans?

title: Hexa Sort
description: Hexa Sort is an addictive puzzle-sorting game that combines strategic matching and merging challenges. In this brain teaser, you will get to shuffle, stack, and strategize to create satisfying color matches.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Donkey Kong Returns
description: Donkey Kong Returns is an arcade platformer that is a faithful recreation of the original Donkey Kong arcade game from the 80s! Jump and weave your way through barrels and flames as you try to rescue your girlfriend Pauline from Donkey Kong, an ape that took her hostage.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Metro Escape
description: On Metro escape you must search the room for items that will help you escape. Search for itens in the metro and use them to solve the puzzles. Look carefully at the various patterns around the metro and solve the riddles. Good luck to search for your way to escape!

title: Bulletstorm
description: Bulletstorm is a relentless FPS survival shooter set in a devastated world overrun by the undead. Dual-wield over 50 unique firearms, command a diverse team of heroes, and take on screen-flooding zombie hordes with explosive intensity.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Herobrine vs Monster School
description: Herobrine vs Monster School is an archery game where you play as Herobrine who finally gets angry at all of the students of the Monster School who behaved terribly. Therefore, Herobrine decided to destroy Monster School and everything connected with it with his crossbow, wooden arrows, and TNT!
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Math Master
description: Unleash your inner math whiz! Math Master turns numbers into art—solve fun math problems to unlock drawing tools, sketch colorful shapes, and bring numerical puzzles to life. Perfect for learners and creativity lovers alike!

title: Game Cafe Escape
description: Game Cafe Escape is another room escape game from masasgames. This time you have to solve puzzles and escape from a beautifully designed game cafe.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Draw Bridge: Brain Game
description: Draw Bridge Puzzle - Draw Game is an exciting and challenging brain game that will put your problem-solving skills to the test. In this bridge-building adventure, your task is to draw paths for the car to safely navigate through obstacles and reach its destination. Get ready to embark on a thrilling journey of bridge construction and puzzle-solving as you draw roads to rescue the stranded car!

title: Paint the Flag

description: Welcome to Ink Shop: Dress & Tattoo, a unique and immersive game that lets you unleash your inner tattoo artist. This isn't just any game; it's your gateway to a world where art meets relaxation, and where your creativity can truly shine. Prepare to immerse yourself in the satisfying and intricate process of tattooing, all at the tip of your fingers!

title: Obby Massive Attack
description:
Help the Obby blox friends to rescue the hapless citizens of a city. During the adventure, you'll get bonuses that give you superpowers that will allow you to sweep aside everything in your path.
Obby Masive Attack is the ideal game for anyone who loves the running game genre. This time, Obby and friends are the protagonist - the game offers fast gameplay, nice graphics, special effects and good playability.
Collect coin and buy new power ups, and run forever in this fantastic endless adventure.

title: Athena Match
description: Embark on a mythical journey in Athena Match, a Match 3 game set in Ancient Greece. Guided by the goddess Athena, match three or more identical artifacts to clear levels and uncover Greek secrets. Stunning visuals and rich soundscapes bring this world to life as you solve puzzles and overcome mythical obstacles inspired by Greek lore. Ready to prove your skills? Join Athena and dive into the adventure!

title: Stick Hero Battle
description: Stick Hero Battle is a fast-paced and explosive action fighting game that throws you straight into intense battle arenas. The game features easy-to-learn controls with deep combat mechanics. Control a fearless stick hero and fight your way through waves of enemies using powerful attacks, smart movement, and perfect timing.

title: Food Card Sort
description: Food Card Sort is a unique and challenging 3D puzzle game that tests players' logic and reasoning skills. With a variety of food cards, each card displaying a different type of food, players must categorize them by placing similar foods together on the corresponding plate to pass each level.

title: Brawl Stars
description: Welcome to a multiplayer arena game! Brawl Stars will take you into a world full of action .io battles! You will experience nervous PVP battles and a unique evolution system. Choose your favorite hero including fire dragons, electric dogs or flower spirits.

title: Parkour Master
description: Parkour Master is a 3D parkour game in which you need to dash and jump from rooftop to rooftop. Flip, jump, and vault over obstacles to set all new records!
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Flappy Dunk
description: Flappy Dunk is a casual basketball game where you tap to propel the ball through hoops, earning points and unlocking new balls along the way. The game seamlessly blends simple one-touch controls with a challenging gameplay that's easy to grasp but hard to master.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Shatter Knight
description: Shatter Knight is a platformer arcade game where you control a knight with the unique ability to change and shatter his armor to gain different powers. Switch between armor types strategically to overcome obstacles and navigate challenging levels.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Crown & Cannon
description: Crown & Cannon is a fast-paced 2D strategy game where players expand territory, deploy various weapons, and battle dynamic AI on destructible terrain. It features upgradeable units, strategic combat, and is optimized for Web platforms and cross platform.

title: Water Sort Puzzle 3
description: Face a super satisfying liquid sorting challenge with Water Sort Puzzle 3! This addictive puzzle game turns simple color sorting into a relaxing yet brain-teasing experience you won’t want to stop playing! This game is perfect for those who enjoy calm but clever challenges. It trains your logic while keeping the experience relaxing and fun. As a true casual game, it’s ideal for quick breaks and time killing, making every moment feel satisfying and rewarding!

title: My Perfect Mine
description:
Become the leader of the Mining Empire!
You are the head of the mining business. There are several workers under your leadership. Send them to the mine to extract a valuable resource - gold. But not everything is as monotonous as you might think!

title: Fruit Merge: Juicy Drop Game
description: Fruit Merge: Juicy Drop Game is a vibrant fruit-matching puzzle that challenges your strategic skills. Combine identical fruits to create larger ones, but beware—space is limited!
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Slope Car
description: Slope Car is an arcade game to drive your car on a randomized slope and go as far as possible. This game is a combination of Crazy Roll 3D and driving a car.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game
